---
title: "Physical activity dashboard"
author: "Azubuike Bright"
format: dashboard
theme: Pulse
---


```{python}
# import packages
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
```


```{python}
# loading data
physical_activity = pd.read_csv("physical_activity.csv")
```

```{python}
# data cleaning
physical_activity=physical_activity.rename(columns={"oms_recommendation":"who_recommendation"})
physical_activity["bmi"] = pd.to_numeric(physical_activity["bmi"], errors="coerce")
physical_activity["sedentary_ap_s_day"] = pd.to_numeric(physical_activity["sedentary_ap_s_day"], errors="coerce")
physical_activity["light_ap_s_day"] = pd.to_numeric(physical_activity["light_ap_s_day"], errors="coerce")
physical_activity["mvpa_s_day"] = pd.to_numeric(physical_activity["mvpa_s_day"], errors="coerce")
```

```{python}
# renaming rows
physical_activity["status"]=physical_activity["status"].replace({"Adulte": "Adult", "Enfant":"Infant"})
```

```{python}
# time conversion
physical_activity["mvpa_min_day"]=physical_activity["mvpa_s_day"]/60
physical_activity["sedentary_min_day"]= physical_activity["sedentary_ap_s_day"]/60
physical_activity["light_min_day"]= physical_activity["light_ap_s_day"]/60
```

```{python}
# data summary
physical_activity_avg=physical_activity.groupby(["sex", "status", "who_recommendation"]).agg(
avg_bmi=("bmi", "mean"), avg_mvpa_min_day=("mvpa_min_day", "mean"), avg_sedentary_min_day=("sedentary_min_day", "mean")).reset_index()
```

```{python}
# droping column
physical_activity=physical_activity.drop(columns={"sedentary_ap_s_day", "light_ap_s_day", "mvpa_s_day"})
```

```{python}
# % meeting WHO recommendations by sex 
who_by_sex = (
     physical_activity
    .groupby(["sex", "who_recommendation"])
    .size()
     .reset_index(name="count")
     )


who_by_sex["percentage"] = (
    who_by_sex.groupby("sex")["count"]
    .transform(lambda x: x / x.sum() * 100)
    )

#% meeting WHO recommendations by age group
who_by_age= (
    physical_activity
    .groupby(["status", "who_recommendation"])
    .size()
    .reset_index(name="count")
)

who_by_age["percentage"] = (
    who_by_age.groupby("status")["count"]
    .transform(lambda x: x / x.sum() * 100)
    )   
```

```{python}
# chats
bar_chart=px.bar(physical_activity_avg, x="status", y="avg_mvpa_min_day", color="sex", title="Average MVPA (minutes/day) by age group and sex")

scatter_plot=px.scatter(physical_activity, x="mvpa_min_day", y="bmi", color="who_recommendation", title="BMI vs MVPA")

box_plot=px.box(physical_activity, x="sex", y="sedentary_min_day", title="Distribution of Sedentary time across sexes", color="sex")

stack_bar=px.bar(who_by_age, x="status", y="percentage", color="who_recommendation", title="WHO Recommendation by Age Group").update_layout(barmode="stack")
```

# Dashboard

## {height="15%"}
### column {width="20%"}
:::{.valuebox icon="people-fill" color="#1871d6" title="Total participants"}
142
:::
### column {width="20%"}
:::{.valuebox icon="activity" color="#f59342" title="Average BMI of adults and children"}
53
:::
### column {width="20%"}
:::{.valuebox icon="alarm" color="#ec840d" title="Average sedentary time (hours/day)"}
11
:::
### column {width="20%"}
:::{.valuebox icon="person-walking" color="#08dd96" title="% of meeting WHO recommendation"}
34
:::

## {height="30%"}

### {width="65%"}
```{python}
bar_chart
```
### {width="35%"}

```{python}
scatter_plot
```
## {height="30%"}
### {width="50%"}

```{python}
box_plot
```
### {width="50%"}
```{python}
stack_bar
```
